entry.title: BILL038(26) (Honolulu): Communication D-445(26) approved.
entry.content:
RELATING TO TRANSIT-ORIENTED DEVELOPMENT SPECIAL DISTRICT.

Amends the LUO by expanding the TOO Special District boundaries to the East Kapolei Neighborhood TOD Plan area, adding primary design objectives and use regulations, and modifying the TOD Special District Project Classification table.

Latest action: Communication D-445(26) approved.

View on the council site
